modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to send email due to attachment size limit.

full_description_text: User tried to send an email with attachments. Got an error saying the message is too large. They need to make it smaller by removing attachments. This is a common issue in Outlook.
short_description: Unable to send email due to attachment size limit.
description: User tried to send an email with attachments. Got an error saying the message is too large. They need to make it smaller by removing attachments. This is a common issue in Outlook.
